ques: Browse for a compact air fryer on Amazon with a capacity of 2 to 3 quarts. It should have a digital display, auto shutoff and be priced under $100.
answer: CHEFMAN 2 Qt Mini Air Fryer (Black) — a compact 2-quart air fryer with a digital touchscreen display and automatic shutoff, priced at EUR35.23 (~$38, well under $100), meeting all criteria.
